content:
## Summary

Standardize the PR body shape across flowkit and swarmkit so reviewers see the same three sections on every PR and release-time ref aggregation picks up every `Closes` token.

## Changes

- `plugins/_shared/pr-body.md` — add canonical spec.
- `plugins/flowkit/skills/open-pr/SKILL.md` — reference canonical shape.

## Test plan

- [ ] Open a PR via `/flowkit:open-pr` and confirm all three sections appear.
- [ ] Include `Closes #123` in a commit; confirm it appears in the PR footer.

Closes #521
Closes #522
Refs #526

Add user profile feature with avatar upload support.

## Changes

- `handler.py` — add avatar upload endpoint.

## Test plan

- [ ] Upload a valid JPEG and confirm it appears.

Closes #88 #89 #90

- Add user profile feature.

## Summary

Fix the login redirect bug. This PR updates `auth/redirect.py` to handle the edge case.

## Changes

- `auth/redirect.py` — update handler.

## Test plan

- [ ] Login redirects correctly.

Resolves #33

## Summary

Add rate limiting to the API gateway to prevent abuse and protect downstream services during traffic spikes.

## Changes

- `gateway/middleware.py` — add `RateLimitMiddleware` with configurable thresholds.
- `config/defaults.yaml` — add `rate_limit_rpm` default (100).
- `tests/test_gateway.py` — add unit tests for the middleware.

## Test plan

- [ ] Confirm 429 is returned after 100 requests in 60 seconds.
- [ ] Confirm the limit is configurable via `rate_limit_rpm`.
- [ ] CI passes all new unit tests.

Closes #201
Refs #198

content:
## Summary

Fix the prBase pin leak in swarm teardown paths so `claude.flowkit.prBase` is always cleared after a swarm run, regardless of exit path.

## Changes

- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/SKILL.md` — add explicit prBase unset to all exit paths.
- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/scripts/teardown.sh` — add `git config --unset` call.

## Test plan

- [ ] Run swarm in epic mode; confirm prBase is unset after normal completion.
- [ ] Run swarm; interrupt early; confirm prBase is unset.
- [ ] `bash scripts/test-all-skill-scripts.sh` passes.

Closes #1054
Refs #1053

## Summary

Fix the prBase pin leak.

## Changes

- `teardown.sh` — add unset call.
- `SKILL.md` — document exit paths.

## Test Plan

- [ ] Run swarm and confirm prBase is unset.

Closes #1054
violation: heading is 'Test Plan' (capital P) not '## Test plan'

content:
## Summary

Port the `Button`, `Input`, and `Select` shadcn primitives to the design-system package so downstream components can import them directly.

## Changes

- `packages/design-system/Button.tsx` — add Button primitive.
- `packages/design-system/Input.tsx` — add Input primitive.
- `packages/design-system/Select.tsx` — add Select primitive.
- `packages/design-system/index.ts` — re-export all three.

## Test plan

- [ ] Each primitive renders correctly in Storybook.
- [ ] Downstream `packages/app` imports from design-system without errors.
- [ ] TypeScript compiles clean (`tsc --noEmit`).

Closes #301
Closes #302
Closes #303
Refs #290

Update base-resolution spec to flowkit-v4 single-trunk reality.

## Changes

- `plugins/_shared/base-resolution.md` — remove develop references.

## Test plan

Manual: review the updated spec.

Closes #1058
violation: Test plan has no checklist items (bare prose)

content:
## Summary

Add the `--no-epic` flag to swarm to allow forcing flat-to-base PRs even when multiple issues are provided.

## Changes

- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/SKILL.md` — document `--no-epic` flag.
- `plugins/swarmkit/README.md` — add flag to the flag matrix.

## Test plan

- [ ] Run `/swarm 10 11 12 --no-epic`; confirm PRs target `main` and no feature branch is cut.
- [ ] Run `/swarm 10 11 12` (without flag); confirm feature branch is cut.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/lint-skills.py` exits 0.

Closes #1045

## Summary

This fix addresses the stale develop references found in the 2026-06-01 audit by purging them from single-trunk surfaces.

## Changes

- Multiple files updated.

## Test plan

- [ ] Grep for develop references confirms they are gone.

Closes #1057
violation: Changes section vague ('Multiple files updated') — no file references

content:
## Summary

Guarantee prBase pin clearance on all swarm exit paths by threading the teardown call through the early-exit branch and adding an explicit unset to the one-shot flow.

## Changes

- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/SKILL.md` — add teardown to one-shot epic and early-exit paths.
- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/scripts/teardown.sh` — add `git config --unset claude.flowkit.prBase`.
- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/scripts/test.sh` — add teardown smoke test.

## Test plan

- [ ] Run swarm in epic mode; confirm prBase is unset after completion.
- [ ] Manually set prBase; run swarm with empty board; confirm prBase is unset.
- [ ] `bash scripts/test-all-skill-scripts.sh` passes.

Closes #1059
Refs #1053

## Summary

Fix swarm epic arg mode resolution.

## Changes

- SKILL.md updated.

## Test plan

- [ ] Test manually.

Closes #1069
violation: Changes and Test plan are underspecified (no file paths, no behavioral check)

content:
## Summary

Resolve epic mode for a single epic argument by probing gather_issues output before finalizing EPIC_MODE, so `/swarm <epic#>` correctly activates epic mode when the argument expands to wired children.

## Changes

- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/SKILL.md` — add single-epic-arg probe to Epic Mode Resolution.
- `plugins/swarmkit/METHODOLOGY.md` — document the new behavior.
- `plugins/swarmkit/README.md` — update flag/mode description.
- `openspec/specs/swarmkit-swarm/spec.md` — apply change delta.
- `plugins/swarmkit/skills/swarm/scripts/test.sh` — add single-epic-arg + standalone-issue fixtures.

## Test plan

- [ ] `/swarm 42` where #42 is an epic with children: confirm feature branch cut.
- [ ] `/swarm 12` where #12 is a standalone: confirm no feature branch.
- [ ] `bash scripts/test-all-skill-scripts.sh` passes.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/lint-skills.py` exits 0.

Closes #1069
Refs #1053

## Summary

Bump versions for the release.

## Changes

- Various plugin.json files updated.

## Test plan

- [ ] Versions look correct.

Closes #1067

## Summary

Add the L1 and L2 skill-eval gates to CI so the existing test.sh suite and the new structural linter run as required checks on every PR touching plugins.

## Changes

- `.github/workflows/skills-ci.yml` — new workflow with L1 and L2 jobs.
- `scripts/lint-skills.py` — L2 linter (frontmatter, includes, links, develop, allowlist rules).
- `evals/README.md` — document both layers and the rule catalog.
- `CLAUDE.md` — add CI gates entry to Skill Authoring Conventions.
- `plugins/_shared/script-authoring.md` — reference the CI gate.
- `.github/workflows/deploy-site.yml` — remove stale develop push trigger.
- `plugins/polishkit/skills/polish/SKILL.md` — fix stale base-resolution prose.
- `plugins/polishkit/skills/sweep/SKILL.md` — fix stale base-resolution prose.

## Test plan

- [ ] `python3 scripts/lint-skills.py` exits 0 (0 errors, warnings only).
- [ ] `bash scripts/test-all-skill-scripts.sh` exits 0 (6 passed).
- [ ] CI shows both L1 and L2 jobs pass on this PR.

Closes #1068

## Summary

Add the L1 and L2 skill-eval gates to CI.

## Changes

- `.github/workflows/skills-ci.yml` — new workflow.
- `scripts/lint-skills.py` — linter.

## Test plan

- [ ] CI passes.

Fixes #1068
violation: uses Fixes instead of Closes; Test plan non-behavioral

content:
## Summary

Fix the `deploy-site.yml` workflow to remove the stale `develop` branch push trigger left over from the flowkit v3 era, so the L2 lint gate passes cleanly.

## Changes

- `.github/workflows/deploy-site.yml` — remove `branches: [develop, main]` push trigger; keep `main` only.

## Test plan

- [ ] `python3 scripts/lint-skills.py` reports 0 errors (the deploy-site develop reference was the last ERROR).
- [ ] CI L2 job passes on this PR.

Closes #1068
